args.name: EXPRESSION
args.description: Conditional expression made of primaries, operators, and operands

suggestions.description: Left string sorts before right string
Left string sorts after right string

options.name: -a
options.description: Logical AND; in some shells, true if FILE exists

options.name: -b
options.description: True if FILE exists and is block special

options.name: -c
options.description: True if FILE exists and is character special

options.name: -d
options.description: True if FILE exists and is a directory

options.name: -e
options.description: True if FILE exists

options.name: -f
options.description: True if FILE exists and is a regular file

options.name: -g
options.description: True if FILE exists and is set-group-ID

options.name: -G
options.description: True if FILE exists and is owned by the effective group ID

options.name: -h
options.description: True if FILE exists and is a symbolic link

options.name: -k
options.description: True if FILE exists and has its sticky bit set

options.name: -L
options.description: True if FILE exists and is a symbolic link

options.name: -n
options.description: True if STRING length is nonzero

options.name: -N
options.description: True if FILE exists and has been modified since it was last read

options.name: -o
options.description: Logical OR; in some shells, true if OPTION is enabled

options.name: -O
options.description: True if FILE exists and is owned by the effective user ID

options.name: -p
options.description: True if FILE exists and is a named pipe

options.name: -r
options.description: True if FILE exists and is readable

options.name: -R
options.description: True if VAR is set and is a name reference

options.name: -s
options.description: True if FILE exists and has a size greater than zero

options.name: -S
options.description: True if FILE exists and is a socket

options.name: -t
options.description: True if FD is opened on a terminal

options.name: -u
options.description: True if FILE exists and its set-user-ID bit is set

options.name: -v
options.description: True if VAR is set

options.name: -w
options.description: True if FILE exists and is writable

options.name: -x
options.description: True if FILE exists and is executable

options.name: -z
options.description: True if STRING length is zero

options.name: -ef
options.description: True if FILE1 and FILE2 refer to the same file

options.name: -nt
options.description: True if FILE1 is newer than FILE2

options.name: -ot
options.description: True if FILE1 is older than FILE2

options.name: -eq
options.description: True if INTEGER1 is equal to INTEGER2

options.name: -ge
options.description: True if INTEGER1 is greater than or equal to INTEGER2

options.name: -gt
options.description: True if INTEGER1 is greater than INTEGER2

options.name: -le
options.description: True if INTEGER1 is less than or equal to INTEGER2

options.name: -lt
options.description: True if INTEGER1 is less than INTEGER2

options.name: -ne
options.description: True if INTEGER1 is not equal to INTEGER2
